name: surface
tagline: Host module for custom Parachute surfaces — drop a built bundle in and serve it under one origin.

credentials.title: Vault read credential
credentials.description: Standing tag-scoped READ credential for a backed surface's server — projects vault content to the surface's audience without any vault token reaching a browser. Surface-host custodies it (0600) and renews it before expiry; backends get a scoped client, never the token.

credentials.title: Vault write credential
credentials.description: Standing tag-scoped WRITE credential for surfaces that write back (collaborative editors). The hub requires a non-empty tag scope for write grants — tags are the sharing scope.
